$comment: Target eCQM measure-bundle portfolio for the CMS measure-bundle fetch/cache script (scripts/fetch-cms-measure-bundles.sh). Bundle file names use the eCQM short id; the fetch script resolves each to a per-year URL under ECQM_BUNDLE_SOURCE_URL. Versions track the published reporting-year eCQM release and should be bumped when the target reporting year advances. The portfolio is the four plan measures (CMS122 diabetes, CMS165 hypertension, CMS130 + CMS125 cancer screening) plus one explicitly chosen additional non-diabetes measure (CMS124 Cervical Cancer Screening) so coverage spans cardiovascular, multiple cancer-screening, and diabetes domains rather than diabetes-only.

source.name: CMS eCQM published measure content (MADiE / eCQI Resource Center)
source.notes: Operator supplies the official per-reporting-year bundle base URL. The script appends <year>/<bundleFile> to ECQM_BUNDLE_SOURCE_URL for each measure.
